message:
feat: Enhance CLI output and suggestion system

Improve meta_skill user experience:

- Extend list command with additional output options
- Improve show command with better formatting
- Enhance search results formatter
- Improve suggestion formatter presentation
- Extend CLI module with new subcommands
- Add output module improvements for detection and plain formatting
- Minor SQLite storage improvements
- Update ACIP security integration
- Enhance bandit suggestion algorithm with better context awareness
- Minor TUI build improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+                body=excluded.body,
